violations.text: The hand sink at the bar is lacking proper hand washing signage. hand sinks shall have signage indicating when and where to wash their hands. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025

Wood is used in the construction of countertop supports in the bar area, shelving mount in the kitchen area, and the door jamb casing inside of the walk-in cooler. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025
